title: Bothan sensory visor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Bothan_Sensory_Visor.png|thumb|right|200px|[[Canderous Ordo]] wearing a Bothan sensory visor]]
A more advanced version of their [[Bothan perception visor|perception visor]], the '''Bothan sensory visor''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Spy/Legends|espionage]] tool that was used to gather information about one's surroundings. Though their standards were extremely high in this area, most Bothans would have considered this visor to be of average quality.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-07-XX -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
